title: Tallinn
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Tallinn''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that contained spares and carried a container of spares. It dropped the container and attempted to enter [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] but was destroyed by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'' Collector's CD-ROM]]
